Notice Of Motion To Compel The Deposition Of C.H. Murphy Clark-Ullman, Inc.¿S Person(S) Most Qualified And Custodian(S) Of Records Or Other Qualified Persons
Off Calendar Jun-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Matthew DaVega, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Daniel Tarbell
No other appearances.

AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Daniel Tarbell's Motion To Compel Deposition Of C.H. Murphy/Clark-Ullman, Inc.'s Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records Or Other Qualified Persons is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to produce its Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records Or Other Qualified Persons within 15 days of notice of this order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
